trajectory.description: Observation: Starting experiment with no prior runs or scores. Analysis: Need to establish baseline pipeline quickly per workflow (few epochs + immediate eval for time measurement). Decision: Implement ResNet50 CNN encoder (grayscale adapted, pretrained weights transferred) + LSTM decoder (teacher forcing in train, greedy generate in inference) as simple seq2seq without attention; train 3 epochs with CE loss on padded sequences; log metrics to jsonl; save best on val exprate; create matching predict.py for test set.

trajectory.description: Observation: Baseline ResNet50+LSTM (no attention) after 3 epochs has train loss down to ~2.6 but val/test exprate=0.0 (le1=0.0017, le2=0.025). Training took ~33s. Model saved but not useful yet. Analysis: Global pooled features + simple LSTM likely insufficient for 2D math structure (common for this task); exact match rate stays 0 until model learns sequence well. Generation or data pipeline may have subtle issues (e.g. tokenization, early EOS). Decision: Add debug.py to inspect GT vs. model predictions on val samples (what is it outputting? empty? repetitive?). Then iterate on model (add spatial features + attention) or train longer (20+ epochs, scheduler) while measuring time. Will submit_eval after improvements.

trajectory.description: Observation: Baseline ResNet50+LSTM (global pool, no attention) after 3 epochs has train loss ~2.6 but val exprate=0.0; debug shows mostly invalid preds like '\sqrt { \mbox \mbox }', '2 = 1', repetitive \mbox (vocab token). Analysis: Pooled vector loses 2D spatial structure essential for math layout (fractions, scripts, sums); simple LSTM can't align tokens to image regions. Decision: Major arch upgrade to ResNet feature maps (conv output flattened to seq of 16 vectors) + LSTM decoder with additive Bahdanau-style attention + mean-pool init for h/c; update Encoder/Decoder/MathExprRecognizer, add Attention nn.Module; set encoded_dim=512, hidden=256; update train.py to 5 epochs + explicit init + full code; batch predict.py for efficiency; rewrite debug.py for new model + sample preds. Train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt to get new baseline score and iteration timing.

trajectory.error_summary:

trajectory.description: Observation: iter3 command failed due to state_dict mismatch (old best.pt from no-attention model has incompatible LSTM/encoder shapes; new attention model uses input_size=768 vs 256). Debug ran partially (vocab=134 printed), loss curve shows training progress (~4.9->1.8) but no new eval yet. Analysis: checkpoint from iter1 is now invalid after arch upgrade; train.py and model.py are truncated/incomplete in workspace (MathExprRecognizer cut off, train save logic missing). Root cause is sequential model evolution without retraining from scratch. Decision: provide complete fixed model.py (add full MathExprRecognizer wrapper + minor fixes for init/forward consistency), complete train.py (add saving logic, increase to 8 epochs for better convergence given ~25s/epoch timing, log exprate), update debug.py to use same params; run train.py && debug.py to train new model from scratch, inspect preds, then submit_eval on updated best.pt for new baseline exprate and time measurement.

Analysis: Attention+spatial features from ResNet are appropriate for 2D math (loss decreasing confirms learning); truncation and checkpoint conflict are root causes from incremental edits. Debug preds will now be more meaningful. Decision: Supply complete fixed model.py (full recognizer wrapper + consistent inits) and train.py (complete training loop, best.pt save on val exprate, 12 epochs given ~25s/epoch timing), minor debug/predict tweaks for robustness; run full train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt for first positive baseline score + updated timing.

trajectory.description: Observation: Attention ResNet-LSTM reaches val exprate 0.0091 (test 0.0067) after 12 epochs; loss drops to ~1.24 but debug preds capture basic structure (sqrt/frac/sub) with many symbol errors. Analysis: seq_len~16 from heavy downsampling loses spatial detail critical for HMER alignment; aspect-distorting fixed resize hurts; more epochs/scheduler + capacity will help but root fix is better feature map (seq~64 via pad+resize). Decision: Rewrite complete model.py (add MathExprRecognizer, preprocess_image for aspect-preserving H=64 W=1024 pad, hidden=512, seq_len~64), full train.py (25 epochs, ReduceLROnPlateau on exprate, complete best/last save, updated Dataset), update predict/debug.py for new preprocess/hidden; run train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt for strong baseline + time check.

Decision: Supply complete non-truncated model.py (add full MathExprRecognizer + fixed generate with EOS stop, no sos/eos in output seqs), complete train.py (remove verbose, add full loop with scheduler.step on exprate, best/last saves, val logging to metrics), keep predict/debug; run full 30-epoch train (timing allows ~15min) + debug + submit_eval for improved baseline.

trajectory.description: Observation: exprate improved to 0.0717 (val peak 0.0872) after 40 epochs; debug shows correct simple cases (e.g. '2 6', partial sqrt) but persistent symbol errors/incompleteness on fractions/scripts (e.g. wrong subscripts, \mbox, early stops). Loss ~1.12, curve steadily decreasing but plateauing. Analysis: Core ResNet+attention captures basic structure; root issues are (1) likely teacher-forcing length/shift bug in Decoder.forward (uses full targets vs. shifted for loss), (2) greedy decode limits seq quality, (3) seq_len and res may lose fine symbols. Incremental edits caused prior truncations but last run succeeded. Decision: Supply COMPLETE fixed model.py (full MathExprRecognizer+corrected teacher-forcing with targets[:,:-1], complete EOS-aware generate, no truncation), COMPLETE train.py (aligned loss with shift, grad_clip=1.0, jsonl metrics logging per epoch+batch, target_h=192, bs=20, 35 epochs, stronger aug/AdamW/scheduler on val_exprate, best.pt on new best); minor predict/debug updates for robustness/map_location. Run train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt for next gain (expect ~0.10+).

trajectory.description: Observation: exprate ~0.069-0.072 (val peak 0.087), loss plateaus ~1.17; debug shows good simple preds (e.g. '2 6', partial sqrt/frac) but frequent symbol errors (\mbox, wrong sub/superscripts/numbers, overgeneration). Analysis: core ResNet+attention+aspect-pad is sound and loss decreases, but truncated model.py (incomplete generate with broken EOS handling) and train.py (incomplete loop/loss) are root causes of suboptimal preds; teacher-forcing shift now aligned but generate must stop per-sample at EOS=2 and exclude SOS/EOS from output latex. Decision: supply fully complete model.py (fixed generate with per-sample finished/EOS logic, no truncation), complete train.py (correct shifted loss vs targets[:,1:], grad_clip=1.0, AdamW+plateau scheduler on val_exprate, full jsonl logging per batch/epoch, 40 epochs, bs=16 for stability), minor predict/debug robustness (strict=False if needed but keep True). Run full train+debug then submit_eval on best.pt; expect fix to lift exprate >0.08.

Analysis: Core ResNet+spatial-attention LSTM is valid (steady loss drop to ~1.0, basic structures learned) but bugs in generate (no per-sample EOS stop, include EOS), forward loss alignment, truncation from incremental edits, and scheduler prevented progress; resume from best.pt possible. Decision: Supply COMPLETE non-truncated model.py (full classes, fixed generate with per-sample EOS stop/exclude sos/eos, default preprocess=256x1664 for detail), COMPLETE train.py (remove verbose, aligned CE loss on targets[:,1:], grad_clip, AdamW+ReduceLROnPlateau on val_exprate, bs=12, aug, resume best.pt, 20 epochs, full per-batch+epoch jsonl logging to metrics.jsonl, best/last saves); keep debug/predict (consistent with new defaults). Run full train+debug (expect ~35min) to fix bugs, improve exprate >0.08 via better preds, then will submit_eval next.

Loss plateaus ~1.05. best.pt likely not optimal due to resume without val reset. Workspace files truncated (model.py/generate incomplete, train.py cut at resume), risking errors. With ~9.7min left, ~3-4 epochs feasible. Decision: Fully rewrite non-truncated model.py (complete _greedy_generate, new _beam_search_single with hidden-per-hyp, length-norm alpha=0.6, proper EOS/SOS strip); set target_h=160/w=1024 (seq~160 balanced).
